transcript.transcript: Hey everyone, welcome to the channel. I'm Vishaka, a senior solutions architect. And today we are learning about APIs from the ground up, what they are, why they matter, and now how they are powering AI applications. Understanding how systems communicate is a skill every engineer should have. I repeat, every engineer should know how APIs work.
